event: View of a Venetian Courtyard and Canal
description: A vertical view of a weathered Venetian building facade with a central arched doorway opening onto a canal visible beyond. The plaster walls are mottled ochre and brown with age. Two upper-story windows have green and blue wooden shutters, some open, some closed. A flower arrangement sits in a pot near the left of the cobblestone courtyard. The scene is rendered in warm, atmospheric tones suggesting late afternoon light, with a salmon-colored sky above the roofline.
